channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped duvet, 15th April
item.description:
Dumped duvet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 15th April
item.description:
Supermarket trolleys full of rubbish dumped mattess. Foxs have now got to rubhudh bags!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Celandine Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie Bins and Black Bags Obstructing Footpath, 15th April
item.description:
The occupier of this address puts Non Recycable rubbish out on pavement blocking footpath every second week ,The Black Bags GET rIPPED OPEN AND THE RUBBISH STREWN AROUND THE aREA BY vERMIN fOXES wE wILL hAVE A rAT iSSUES IF NOT DEALT WITH
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Offenham Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste, 15th April
item.description:
Not sure how to stop people leaving this waste outside my home

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, 15th April
item.description:
These trees need to be cut right back please. They have sharp bits on them so risk of scratching clothing and face when passing other pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag dumped on pavement between 4A &2 First Avenue, 15th April
item.description:
Foxes have torn open the bag rubbish strewn across pavement and driveway of 4A First Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): First Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A car parked on the sidewalk, 15th April
item.description:
This Mercedes parks on the sidewalk almost every day and makes it difficult for pedestrians to cross.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitefoot Lane, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bent Signpost 122 Parish Lane, 15th April
item.description:
Reported previously under Ref 9045359 but no acknowledgement that this will be fixed. The last status update claims that this had been fixed but it has not. Please can the council instruct their contractor to action properly this time?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flying tipping, 15th April
item.description:
Large broken mirror on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hadley Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in road, 15th April
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the road just after the bollards and where the side entrance to the park is.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 409, Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste on grass, 15th April
item.description:
Food waste on grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish on public bins, 15th April
item.description:
Tenants in the flats on the picture persistently throw their household rubbish on the bin by the bus stop. If the gag is too big (pictured), they leave it on the pavement for foxes and seagulls.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bed, 15th April
item.description:
Fly tipping. Abandoned bed. I have photos of the person and vehicle responsible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed, 15th April
item.description:
Bed frame and mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dursley Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Few rubbish bags, 15th April
item.description:
A few rubbish bags abandoned on the pavement. The flces have ripped them and scattered the contents

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolacombe Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish at litter bin, 15th April
item.description:
Please remove. Contact householder. Lots of public bins are being misused as household refuse bins in this area. Put signs on bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sterry St, SE1 -flytipping, 15th April
item.description:
Looks like someone's property is being refurbished and they can't be bothered to go to tip.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28-52, Pilgrimage Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
